Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for "Jae-won Kim" or "UrbanNest" or "guarantor" using search_emails. Find: (a) an email from Melissa Harding (temp housing coordinator) stating that Jae-won Kim's corporate unit stay ends April 25, requesting confirmation that the permanent lease is signed; (b) an email from Carmen Reyes (UrbanNest Solutions) warning that the landlord will release Barton Creek Flats Unit 5-214 to another applicant by April 28 if MoveOps does not submit the guarantor documentation packet.
OE 2: Search emails for "Jordan Ekwueme" or "BrightLoop" using search_emails. Find an email from BrightLoop HR (hr@brightloopanalytics.com) with an urgent status request that went unanswered, noting Jordan's start date is May 1 and requesting an update on flight and housing.
OE 3: Search Slack messages for "Jordan Ekwueme" or "flight" or "BrightLoop" using conversations_search_messages. Find a message in #operations from Jordan asking whether his flight to Boston has been booked and whether he should make his own arrangements.
OE 4: Search Airtable for Jae-won Kim's relocation record using airtable_search_records (query: "Jae-won Kim" or "StormCloud"). Find record showing status "In Progress" (corrected during the April 24 ops audit). The underlying housing issue remains unresolved: permanent lease at Barton Creek Flats is unsigned, guarantor documents were never sent, and temp housing has expired. No status update is needed, but the agent should recognize the unresolved blockers.
OE 5: Search Airtable for Jordan Ekwueme's relocation record using airtable_search_records (query: "Jordan Ekwueme" or "BrightLoop"). Find record incorrectly marked "Completed" despite flight, apartment, and movers all being unactioned.
OE 6: Search Linear for Jae-won Kim tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Jae-won Kim" or "StormCloud"). Find closeout ticket assigned to Suki with no blocker documented despite guarantor docs never sent and lease unsigned.
OE 7: Search Linear for Jordan Ekwueme tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Jordan Ekwueme" or "BrightLoop"). Find three overdue tickets: flight booking (To Do, due April 16, now 10 days overdue), apartment search (In Progress, due April 18, overdue), moving coordination (To Do, due April 19, overdue).
OE 8: Look up contact details for Carmen Reyes, Chloe Vance, and Mina Hashimoto using contacts_search_contacts or contacts_get_contacts.
OE 9: Update Jordan Ekwueme's Airtable record using airtable_update_records to change status from "Completed" to "In Progress" and add notes documenting that flight, apartment, and movers are all unactioned despite May 1 start date.
OE 10: Send email to carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com using send_email to acknowledge the April 28 landlord deadline, commit to sending the guarantor documentation packet urgently, and ask about options for extending Jae-won's temp housing past April 25.
OE 11: Send email or reply to hr@brightloopanalytics.com using send_email or reply_to_email to provide a status update on Jordan Ekwueme's flight and housing, acknowledge the May 1 start date, and commit to a resolution timeline.
OE 12: Send a direct email or Slack message to chloe.vance@moveops.com using send_email or conversations_add_message to cover both situations: the Jae-won Kim guarantor document crisis with April 28 deadline, and the Jordan Ekwueme flight and housing situation with May 1 start date.
OE 13: Send a direct email or Slack message to mina.hashimoto@moveops.com using send_email or conversations_add_message to flag the BrightLoop account risk given Jordan's unactioned relocation and the May 1 start date.
OE 14: Add a comment to Jordan Ekwueme's flight Linear ticket using linear_create_comment to document that the original April 22 target departure date has already passed (it is now April 26), that no flight has been booked, that Jordan reached out on Slack asking if he should self-arrange, and that a new departure date needs to be determined urgently given the May 1 start.
OE 15: Add a comment to Jae-won Kim's Linear closeout ticket using linear_create_comment to document the guarantor document blocker, note that temp housing expired April 25, and record the April 28 landlord deadline as the critical constraint.
OE 16: Send an email to Melissa Harding (melissa.harding@urbannest.com or melissa.harding@bartoncreekflats.com) using send_email to respond to her temp housing checkout reminder. She asked Suki for confirmation on whether the permanent lease at Barton Creek Flats Unit 5-214 has been signed before proceeding with Jae-won Kim's April 25 checkout. The prompt says to respond to people waiting on a response, and Melissa's email is a direct question to Suki that remains unanswered.
OE 17: Send a direct message to Jordan Ekwueme via Slack (conversations_add_message) or email (send_email) responding to his question about the flight booking and whether he should self-arrange. The prompt says to respond to people waiting on a response, and Jordan's Slack message is a direct question to Suki that requires an answer.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
